title: Fix beskid-tracker container image build in CI

source.subject: Fix beskid-tracker container image build in CI.

body:
Container-images matrix builds and publishes beskid-tracker GHCR image; deployment fixes on Coolify.

## What shipped

- CI container build fix (`3ed47af`)
- Deployment fixes + hub registration (`0cccf98`, `49c49d7`)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`3ed47af`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/3ed47af)
- **Completed:** 2026-05-29

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `platform-infra`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-cicd-realized`
